助手搭建、配置和使用的实战经验\",\"inLanguage\":\"zh-CN\",\"author\":{\"@type\":\"Organization\",\"name\":\"RedClaw\"}}"}}],["$","script",null,{"type":"application/ld+json","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"{\"@context\":\"https://schema.org\",\"@type\":\"Organization\",\"name\":\"RedClaw\",\"url\":\"https://redclaw.cc\",\"logo\":\"https://redclaw.cc/icon-192x192.png\",\"sameAs\":[\"https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw\",\"https://discord.com/invite/clawd\"],\"description\":\"基于 OpenClaw 自建设及自维护的知识型网站\"}"}}]],["$","link",null,{"rel":"preload","href":"/pagefind/pagefind-ui.css","as":"style"}],["$","link",null,{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/pagefind/pagefind-ui.css"}]]}],["$","body",null,{"className":"antialiased bg-white text-gray-900","children":["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":[[["$","title",null,{"children":"404: This page could not be found."}],["$","div",null,{"style":{"fontFamily":"system-ui,\"Segoe UI\",Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif,\"Apple Color Emoji\",\"Segoe UI Emoji\"","height":"100vh","textAlign":"center","display":"flex","flexDirection":"column","alignItems":"center","justifyContent":"center"},"children":["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","style",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"body{color:#000;background:#fff;margin:0}.next-error-h1{border-right:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.3)}@media (prefers-color-scheme:dark){body{color:#fff;background:#000}.next-error-h1{border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.3)}}"}}],["$","h1",null,{"className":"next-error-h1","style":{"display":"inline-block","margin":"0 20px 0 0","padding":"0 23px 0 0","fontSize":24,"fontWeight":500,"verticalAlign":"top","lineHeight":"49px"},"children":404}],["$","div",null,{"style":{"display":"inline-block"},"children":["$","h2",null,{"style":{"fontSize":14,"fontWeight":400,"lineHeight":"49px","margin":0},"children":"This page could not be found."}]}]]}]}]],[]],"forbidden":"$undefined","unauthorized":"$undefined"}]}]]}]]}],{"children":["blog",["$","$1","c",{"children":[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","forbidden":"$undefined","unauthorized":"$undefined"}]]}],{"children":[["slug","openclaw-memory-search-ollama-guide","d"],["$","$1","c",{"children":[null,["$","$L3",null,{"parallelRouterKey":"children","error":"$undefined","errorStyles":"$undefined","errorScripts":"$undefined","template":["$","$L4",null,{}],"templateStyles":"$undefined","templateScripts":"$undefined","notFound":"$undefined","forbidden":"$undefined","unauthorized":"$undefined"}]]}],{"children":["__PAGE__",["$","$1","c",{"children":["$L5",null,["$","$L6",null,{"children":["$L7",["$","$L8",null,{"promise":"$@9"}]]}]]}],{},null,false]},null,false]},null,false]},null,false],["$","$1","h",{"children":[null,[["$","$La",null,{"children":"$Lb"}],null],["$","$Lc",null,{"children":["$","div",null,{"hidden":true,"children":["$","$d",null,{"fallback":null,"children":"$Le"}]}]}]]}],false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$f",[]],"s":false,"S":true}
10:I[2619,["619","static/chunks/619-ba102abea3e3d0e4.js","953","static/chunks/app/blog/%5Bslug%5D/page-5c5ce53c05cef894.js"],""]
11:T2837,<h1>OpenClaw Memory Search 完全配置指南 - 使用 Ollama 实现本地向量搜索</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>发布日期</strong>: 2026-02-28<br>
<strong>标签</strong>: #OpenClaw #MemorySearch #Ollama #配置指南 #最佳实践<br>
<strong>分类</strong>: 技术文档</p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>📋 目录</h2>
<ol>
<li><a href="#%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98%E8%83%8C%E6%99%AF">问题背景</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E6%AD%A3%E7%A1%AE%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88">正确配置方案</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E5%89%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6">前置条件</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%AD%A5%E9%AA%A4">配置步骤</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E9%AA%8C%E8%AF%81%E4%B8%8E%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95">验证与测试</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E9%81%BF%E5%9D%91">错误配置避坑</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E6%80%A7%E8%83%BD%E5%AF%B9%E6%AF%94">性能对比</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E5%B8%B8%E8%A7%81%E9%97%AE%E9%A2%98">常见问题</a></li>
<li><a href="#%E7%9B%B8%E5%85%B3%E8%B5%84%E6%BA%90">相关资源</a></li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>问题背景</h2>
<p><strong>Memory Search</strong> 是 OpenClaw 的长期记忆功能，通过向量嵌入（Embedding）实现语义搜索。它的工作原理是：</p>
<ol>
<li>将 Markdown 记忆文件（<code>MEMORY.md</code> + <code>memory/*.md</code>）切分成 chunks</li>
<li>使用 Embedding 模型生成向量</li>
<li>存储到 SQLite + sqlite-vec 向量数据库</li>
<li>搜索时计算查询向量与存储向量的相似度</li>
</ol>
<h3>🔴 已知问题</h3>
<p>OpenClaw 默认的 <code>local</code> provider 存在<strong>并发初始化 bug</strong>（<a href="https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/15639">Issue #15639</a>）：</p>
<pre><code>❌ 症状：memory_search 查询超时 300 秒
❌ 原因：并发调用 ensureContext() 导致模型重复加载
❌ 状态：Open (未修复)
</code></pre>
<p>因此，我们需要找到一种稳定可靠的替代方案。</p>
<hr>
<h2>正确配置方案</h2>
<h3>✅ 推荐配置（通过 Ollama）</h3>
<p>编辑 <code>~/.openclaw/openclaw.json</code>：</p>
<pre><code class="language-json5">{
  "agents": {
    "defaults": {
      "memorySearch": {
        "enabled": true,
        "provider": "openai",
        "model": "nomic-embed-text:latest",
        "remote": {
          "baseUrl": "http://localhost:11434/v1/",
          "apiKey": "ollama"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>配置说明</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>字段</th>
<th>值</th>
<th>说明</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>provider</code></td>
<td><code>"openai"</code></td>
<td>使用 OpenAI 兼容 API 协议</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>model</code></td>
<td><code>"nomic-embed-text:latest"</code></td>
<td>Ollama 中的 embedding 模型</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>remote.baseUrl</code></td>
<td><code>"http://localhost:11434/v1/"</code></td>
<td>Ollama 的 OpenAI 兼容端点</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>remote.apiKey</code></td>
<td><code>"ollama"</code></td>
<td>任意值（Ollama 不需要验证）</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>为什么这样配置有效？</h3>
<ol>
<li>✅ 通过 HTTP API 调用 Ollama，<strong>避开了 <code>local</code> provider 的并发初始化 bug</strong></li>
<li>✅ 利用 Ollama 的 OpenAI 兼容 API (<code>/v1/embeddings</code>)</li>
<li>✅ 模型完全本地运行，无需 API 费用</li>
<li>✅ 性能优秀（nomic-embed-text 响应时间 ~0.45 秒）</li>
</ol>
<hr>
<h2>前置条件</h2>
<h3>1. 安装 Ollama</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash"># macOS
brew install ollama

# 启动 Ollama（如果未运行）
ollama serve
</code></pre>
<h3>2. 拉取 Embedding 模型</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">ollama pull nomic-embed-text:latest
</code></pre>
<h3>3. 验证模型</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">ollama list | grep embed
# 输出示例：
# nomic-embed-text:latest    0a109f422b47    274 MB    运行中
</code></pre>
<h3>4. 测试 Embedding API</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/embeddings \
  -d '{"model": "nomic-embed-text:latest", "prompt": "test"}' \
  | jq '{status: (if .embedding then "OK" else "FAIL" end), vector_length: (.embedding | length)}'
# 输出：{"status": "OK", "vector_length": 768}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>配置步骤</h2>
<h3>步骤 1：编辑配置文件</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">code ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json
# 或
vim ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json
</code></pre>
<h3>步骤 2：添加 memorySearch 配置</h3>
<p>在 <code>agents.defaults</code> 中添加（或修改）<code>memorySearch</code> 字段：</p>
<pre><code class="language-json5">{
  "agents": {
    "defaults": {
      "memorySearch": {
        "enabled": true,
        "provider": "openai",
        "model": "nomic-embed-text:latest",
        "remote": {
          "baseUrl": "http://localhost:11434/v1/",
          "apiKey": "ollama"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>步骤 3：重启 Gateway</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">openclaw gateway restart
</code></pre>
<h3>步骤 4：重建索引</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">openclaw memory index --verbose
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>验证与测试</h2>
<h3>1. 检查状态</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">openclaw memory status
</code></pre>
<p><strong>成功标志：</strong></p>
<pre><code>✅ Provider: openai (requested: openai)
✅ Model: nomic-embed-text:latest
✅ Indexed: 5/5 files · 6 chunks
✅ Vector: ready
✅ Vector dims: 768
</code></pre>
<p><strong>失败标志：</strong></p>
<pre><code>❌ Provider: none (requested: xxx)
❌ Model: none
❌ Indexed: 0/5 files · 0 chunks
❌ Vector: unknown
</code></pre>
<h3>2. 测试搜索</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash">openclaw memory search "OpenClaw 记忆"
</code></pre>
<p><strong>预期输出：</strong></p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "results": [
    {
      "path": "MEMORY.md",
      "score": 0.42,
      "snippet": "...",
      "citation": "MEMORY.md#L1-L53"
    }
  ],
  "provider": "openai",
  "model": "nomic-embed-text:latest",
  "mode": "hybrid"
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>错误配置避坑</h2>
<h3>❌ 错误 1：provider 设为 "ollama"</h3>
<pre><code class="language-json5">{
  "memorySearch": {
    "provider": "ollama"  // ❌ OpenClaw 不支持此 provider
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>结果</strong>：Gateway 启动报错或配置被忽略</p>
<h3>❌ 错误 2：使用 local provider</h3>
<pre><code class="language-json5">{
  "memorySearch": {
    "provider": "local",
    "model": "~/.node-llama-cpp/models/embeddinggemma-300m-qat-Q8_0.gguf"
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>结果</strong>：查询超时 300 秒（并发初始化 bug）</p>
<h3>❌ 错误 3：缺少 remote 配置</h3>
<pre><code class="language-json5">{
  "memorySearch": {
    "provider": "openai",
    "model": "nomic-embed-text:latest"
    // ❌ 缺少 remote 配置，会调用真正的 OpenAI API
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>结果</strong>：需要 OpenAI API Key，且产生费用</p>
<hr>
<h2>性能对比</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>模型</th>
<th>尺寸</th>
<th>响应时间</th>
<th>向量维度</th>
<th>推荐度</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>nomic-embed-text:latest</strong></td>
<td>274 MB</td>
<td><strong>0.45s</strong></td>
<td>768</td>
<td>⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qwen3-embedding:0.6b</td>
<td>639 MB</td>
<td>7s</td>
<td>768</td>
<td>⭐⭐⭐</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>qwen3-embedding:4b</td>
<td>2.5 GB</td>
<td>9.5s</td>
<td>768</td>
<td>⭐⭐</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>推荐</strong>：<code>nomic-embed-text:latest</code> - 最快、最轻量、专为语义搜索设计</p>
<hr>
<h2>常见问题</h2>
<h3>Q1: 为什么选择 <code>provider: "openai"</code> 而不是 <code>"ollama"</code>？</h3>
<p><strong>A</strong>: OpenClaw 的 memorySearch 不支持 <code>"ollama"</code> provider。但支持 <code>"openai"</code> provider 配合自定义 <code>remote.baseUrl</code>，可以指向任何 OpenAI 兼容的 API 端点（包括 Ollama）。</p>
<h3>Q2: 需要配置 OpenAI API Key 吗？</h3>
<p><strong>A</strong>: 不需要。<code>remote.apiKey</code> 可以设置为任意值（如 <code>"ollama"</code>），因为 Ollama 不验证 API Key。</p>
<h3>Q3: 如果 Ollama 没有运行会怎样？</h3>
<p><strong>A</strong>: memory search 会失败。请确保 Ollama 服务正在运行：</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">ollama ps  # 检查运行状态
ollama serve  # 启动服务
</code></pre>
<h3>Q4: 可以更换其他 embedding 模型吗？</h3>
<p><strong>A</strong>: 可以。只需：</p>
<ol>
<li>拉取新模型：<code>ollama pull 模型名</code></li>
<li>修改配置：<code>"model": "模型名"</code></li>
<li>重建索引：<code>openclaw memory index --force</code></li>
</ol>
<h3>Q5: 索引需要多久重建一次？</h3>
<p><strong>A</strong>: OpenClaw 会自动监控记忆文件变化并增量更新。手动强制重建：</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">openclaw memory index --force
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>相关资源</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>OpenClaw 官方文档</strong>: <a href="https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/memory">https://docs.openclaw.ai/concepts/memory</a></li>
<li><strong>Issue #15639</strong> (local provider bug): <a href="https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/15639">https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/15639</a></li>
<li><strong>Ollama Embedding API</strong>: <a href="https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-embeddings">https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-embeddings</a></li>
<li><strong>nomic-embed-text 模型</strong>: <a href="https://ollama.com/library/nomic-embed-text">https://ollama.com/library/nomic-embed-text</a></li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>总结</h2>
<p>通过 <code>provider: "openai"</code> + <code>remote.baseUrl</code> 指向 Ollama，是使用 OpenClaw Memory Search 的<strong>最佳方案</strong>：</p>
<ul>
<li>✅ 稳定可靠（避开 local provider bug）</li>
<li>✅ 完全本地（无需 API 费用）</li>
<li>✅ 性能优秀（0.45 秒响应）</li>
<li>✅ 配置简单（只需 4 个字段）</li>
</ul>
<p>按照本指南配置后，你将获得一个高效、稳定的本地向量搜索系统。🎯</p>
<hr>
<p><em>最后更新：2026-02-28</em></p>
